results.name: jsonstring_truthy
results.sql: (meta_str IS NOT NULL AND meta_str != '' AND JSONLength(meta_str) > 0)

results.name: jsonstring_falsy
results.sql: (meta_str IS NULL OR meta_str = '' OR JSONLength(meta_str) = 0)

results.name: join_select_related_alias
results.flyql: t_id, r_category as cat, r_label as lbl
results.sql: t.id, r.category AS cat, r.label AS lbl

results.name: join_select_cross_table_aliases
results.flyql: t_id, t_name as author, r_category as cat, r_label
results.sql: t.id, t.name AS author, r.category AS cat, r.label

results.name: join_select_transformer_mixed
results.flyql: t_id, t_message|upper as upper_msg, r_category, r_priority
results.sql: t.id, upper(t.message) AS upper_msg, r.category, r.priority

results.name: mixed_columns
results.flyql: id, message, meta_str.region as region, count
results.sql: id, message, JSONExtractString(meta_str, 'region') AS region, count

results.name: mixed_all_types
results.flyql: id, message, metadata.tier as tier, tags.1 as tag1, meta_str.region as region
results.sql: id, message, metadata['tier'] AS tier, tags[1] AS tag1, JSONExtractString(meta_str, 'region') AS region

results.name: mixed_jsonstring_and_native_json
results.flyql: id, meta_str.region as js_region, meta_json.region as nj_region
results.sql: id, JSONExtractString(meta_str, 'region') AS js_region, meta_json.`region` AS nj_region

results.name: transformer_mixed_with_plain
results.flyql: id, message, message|upper as upper_message, count
results.sql: id, message, upper(message) AS upper_message, count

results.name: jsonstring_truthy
results.sql: ("meta_str" IS NOT NULL AND "meta_str" != '' AND CASE jsonb_typeof("meta_str"::jsonb) WHEN 'array' THEN jsonb_array_length("meta_str"::jsonb) > 0 WHEN 'object' THEN "meta_str"::jsonb != '{}'::jsonb ELSE false END)

results.name: jsonstring_falsy
results.sql: ("meta_str" IS NULL OR "meta_str" = '' OR CASE jsonb_typeof("meta_str"::jsonb) WHEN 'array' THEN jsonb_array_length("meta_str"::jsonb) = 0 WHEN 'object' THEN "meta_str"::jsonb = '{}'::jsonb ELSE true END)

results.name: function_startof_month_all_past
results.sql: "created_at" < date_trunc('month', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
